args.query: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%hype%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%';

exec_args.sql: SELECT track_id, title, artist, album, year, length, language FROM tracks WHERE lower(title) LIKE '%street%' AND lower(title) LIKE '%hype%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%brucqe%' AND lower(artist) LIKE '%maginnis%';

args.query: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

exec_args.sql: SELECT store, SUM(revenue_usd) AS total_revenue FROM sales WHERE track_id = 4122 GROUP BY store ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

result.preview: "Amazon Music earned the most revenue from Brucqe Maginnis' song \"Street Hype\" across all countries, with total revenue of $304.13."

args.answer: Amazon Music earned the most revenue from Brucqe Maginnis' song "Street Hype" across all countries, with total revenue of $304.13.
